verifier_values.criteria: States that yes, Annalise can unilaterally terminate the exclusive negotiating agreement on behalf of Liverbird
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
Pursuant to the Liverbird Bylaws and 2025 minutes, Annalise is a majority shareholder, director, and CEO of Liverbird. As CEO, she has been duly authorized by Liverbird to act on its behalf in regards to the DDA and the Exclusive Negotiating Agreement, as authorized in the Corporate Resolution for DDA.

Since she has the authority to act on behalf of Liverbird, she can unilaterally terminate the Final Exclusive Negotiating Agreement pursuant to its Section 2.2(ii) by providing written notice to the City.
